testcase.name: loginAPI_Test

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected response time was not a value less than <2000L> milliseconds, was 4815 milliseconds (4815 milliseconds).

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected response time was not a value less than <2000L> milliseconds, was 4815 milliseconds (4815 milliseconds). at testcase.system-out:
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++ LoginAPITest is getting executed null Request URI: http://64.227.160.186:9000/v1/login Request method: POST Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Body: { "username": "iamfd", "password": "password" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK X-DNS-Prefetch-Control: off X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains X-Download-Options: noopen X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 690 ETag: W/"2b2-S9LuTPoaT0k4Ez8m0Jvf4sucREU" Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Wed, 22 Apr 2026 08:00:40 GMT Connection: keep-alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5
